title: Hardware Installation
description:
Hardware Installation

Hardware Installation

Epson RC+ 8.0 is used with the Controller. You need to install the controller and robot before you can use Epson RC+ 8.0 to develop and run SPEL+ applications.

You need to prepare the PC which has Windows which can run the Epson RC+7.0, and which can connect with the Controller using USB or Ethernet.

The Controller comes pre-configured at the factory. For instructions on installation, refer to the Robot Controller manual.
